issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case scenarios for image processing and language support.

scenarios.name: Extract UI labels from a mobile screenshot
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for raw tesseract or pytesseract installs; treatment runs the skill's image-to-text.sh, consumes the JSON with text/confidence/lines, and presents output grouped by line as instructed.

scenarios.name: OCR a French scanned invoice
scenarios.rationale: Baseline shells out to `tesseract -l fra`; treatment passes `fra` as the documented second argument to image-to-text.sh and uses the structured JSON (words/bbox) to parse invoice line items.
